---
id: patch-channels-channel-id-origins-origin-id
title: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/origins/{originId}'
description: 'Update an origin within a channel.'
sidebar_label: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/origins/{originId}'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'patch api-method'
info_path: ads/api/reference/optiview-ads-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Patch /channels/{channelId}/origins/{originId}'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'patch'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/origins/{originId}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Update an origin within a channel.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
    { description: 'Identifier of the origin.', in: 'path', name: 'originId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={'Body'}
  body={{
    content: {
      'application/json': {
        schema: {
          properties: {
            name: { description: 'Human-readable display name for the origin.', type: 'string' },
            priority: {
              description: 'Failover order within the channel; lower means higher priority, and negatives are allowed.',
              maximum: 9007199254740991,
              minimum: -9007199254740991,
              type: 'integer',
            },
            type: { description: 'Manifest format of a stream origin: `DASH`, `HLS`, or `HESP`.', enum: ['DASH', 'HLS', 'HESP'], type: 'string' },
            url: { description: 'Manifest URL polled by the break detection service. Must be a valid URL.', format: 'uri', type: 'string' },
          },
          type: 'object',
        },
      },
    },
    required: true,
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              channelId: { description: 'Identifier of the channel this origin belongs to.', type: 'string' },
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the origin was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              enabled: { description: 'Whether this origin participates in its channel break-detection failover.', type: 'boolean' },
              id: { description: 'Unique origin identifier.', type: 'string' },
              name: { description: 'Human-readable display name for the origin.', type: 'string' },
              priority: { description: 'Failover order within the channel; lower means higher priority. Defaults to 0.', type: 'number' },
              type: { description: 'Manifest format of a stream origin: `DASH`, `HLS`, or `HESP`.', enum: ['DASH', 'HLS', 'HESP'], type: 'string' },
              url: { description: 'Manifest URL polled by the break detection service.', type: 'string' },
            },
            required: ['id', 'channelId', 'url', 'type', 'enabled', 'priority', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
